data.title: US lender Newrez to accept crypto holdings in mortgage approval
data.description:
The new policy will allow borrowers to use Bitcoin, Ether, crypto ETFs and US dollar-backed stablecoins for asset verification and income estimates without liquidation.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/us-lender-newrez-crypto-holdings-mortgage-approval?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Crypto futures legitimized by CME with Cardano, Chainlink, and Stellar addition, but retail traders face a massive catch
data.description:
The era of the crypto industry being seen as a two-asset town is officially over at the world’s largest derivatives marketplace. On Jan. 15, CME Group announced plans to launch futures contracts for Cardano (ADA), Chainlink (LINK), and Stellar (XLM) on Feb. 9, pending regulatory review
source: https://cryptoslate.com/cmes-bold-bet-on-cardano-chainlink-and-stellar-futures/

data.title: Crypto makes inroads into US real estate as Megatel, Newrez clear hurdles for payments, ​rewards token
data.description:
Two major U. S. real estate firms, Newrez LLC and Megatel Homes LLC, have announced that cryptocurrencies will be a big part of their businesses moving forward, per their disclosures. Newrez LLC announced that it will now count cryptocurrency as part of the mortgage risk assessment of potential homebuyers. Meanwhile, Megatel Homes LLC has announced that […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/megatel-newrez-payments-rewards-token/

data.title: Mempool bots battle over compromised BTC
data.description:
Someone sent money to a BTC wallet with a private key already published on the blockchain as a txid. A bot feeding frenzy ensued.
source: https://protos.com/mempool-bots-battle-over-compromised-btc/

data.title: Galaxy's Michael Novogratz Optimistic for Passage of Crypto Clarity Bill
data.description:
Novogratz doesn't believe crypto legislation needs to be perfect to move forward.
source: https://www.bankless.com/read/news/galaxys-michael-novogratz-optimistic-for-passage-of-crypto-clarity-bill

data.title: ZachXBT: The latest XMR rally was linked to a wallet exploit laundering
data.description:
XMR fell 20% from its peak, after on-chain researcher ZachXBT linked the recent pump to a single wallet exploit. An attacker stole $282M in BTC and LTC from a single hardware wallet, laundering the funds through XMR.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/zachxbt-the-latest-xmr-rally-was-linked-to-a-wallet-exploit-laundering/

data.title: U.S. States Accelerate Bitcoin Treasury Plans as West Virginia and Florida Move Ahead
data.description:
U. S. states are pressing forward with Bitcoin-focused treasury strategies, even as federal crypto legislation remains stalled in Washington. Over the past week, West Virginia and Florida have taken concrete legislative steps that underscore a growing state-level push to integrate Bitcoin and digital assets into public finance
source: https://www.ethnews.com/u-s-states-accelerate-bitcoin-treasury-plans-as-west-virginia-and-florida-move-ahead/

data.title: Slips Completes $3.5M Seed Round Led by Major Investors
data.description:
Slips secures $3. 5M in seed funding, expanding its AI-powered prediction market platform with crypto support.
source: https://coincu.com/news/slips-35m-seed-funding-investors/

data.title: Grant Cardone pushes crypto real estate hybrid amid Trump house shakeup plans
data.description:
Grant Cardone is pushing a new way to invest that combines real estate and crypto coins. This is happening while US President Donald Trump is pushing plans that might change the housing market by making it more affordable and increasing the supply. He claims that it is the perfect time to blend cash flow with […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/grant-cardone-pushes-crypto-real-estate-hybrid-amid-trump-house-shakeup-plans/

data.title: XRP ETFs Hit $1.71B as Price Lags Behind — Here Is Whether $3 Is Still in Play
data.description:
The total value of XRP exchange-traded funds (ETFs) surged to an impressive $1.71 billion, even as the cryptocurrency's price struggles to keep up and remains relatively stagnant. In light of these developments, many investors and analysts are left wondering whether the potential for XRP to reach a price point of $3 is still a viable possibility in the coming weeks and months.
source: https://blocknews.com/xrp-etfs-hit-1-71b-as-price-lags-behind-here-is-whether-3-is-still-in-play/

data.title: Renowned Cryptocurrency Fund Founder Claims ‘Bitcoin Will Die Within 7-11 Years’ – Here’s Why
data.description:
Justin Bons, founder and CIO of CyberCapital, claimed that Bitcoin could die due to underlying problems. Continue Reading: Renowned Cryptocurrency Fund Founder Claims ‘Bitcoin Will Die Within 7-11 Years’ – Here’s Why
source: https://en.bitcoinsistemi.com/renowned-cryptocurrency-fund-founder-claims-bitcoin-will-die-within-7-11-years-here-s-why/

data.title: Bitcoin Seized From Samourai Wallet Has Not Been Sold, White House Says
data.description:
Advocates for the incarcerated Samourai Wallet developers have argued that the DOJ liquidated the Bitcoin funds against the president’s wishes.
source: https://decrypt.co/354941/bitcoin-seized-samourai-wallet-reserve-not-sold-white-house

data.title: Monero hit an all-time high earlier this week, and crypto sleuth ZachXBT thinks he knows why
data.description:
ZachXBT said that funds stolen during a social engineering hack were swapped to Monero, helping to push the asset to new highs.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/386014/monero-hit-all-time-high-this-week-crypto-sleuth-zachxbt-thinks-he-knows-why?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss
